_comment: CI-only typecheck config (the test.yml typecheck step). The repo has no package.json and no runtime dependencies - CI installs typescript + @types/node ephemerally (npm install --no-save) just to honor the @ts-check pragmas in cadence-core/bin. strict stays off: the pragmas exist to catch real drift (bad imports, wrong shapes), not to force annotation ceremony onto zero-dep scripts.
